rows.source_ref: sharpiemomo, "Simple System", ForexFactory thread 1184099, year n.d. (archived 2026-07-24), https://www.forexfactory.com/thread/1184099-simple-system
rows.strategy_name: APB Heiken-Ashi Color-Flip NY-Open Reversal Scalp (US30)
rows.concept: Enter on the first opposite-color APB (modified Heiken-Ashi) bar close during the NY open on US30, stopping at the prior momentum extreme, to capitalize on price rejections at tops/bottoms.
rows.eligibility_reason: Entry+stop are mechanical (first opposite modified-HA close, stop at prior swing extreme, US30 NY 09:30-12:00 EST) and testable on WS30 M5/M15 .DWX data; exit is fully discretionary ('no TP rule', fast partials ~0.5RR, scratch runners) and must be mechanized (opposite-flip or session-flat) before backtest.
rows.notes: APB = modified Heiken-Ashi indicator (APB.mq4/.ex4 attached, MT4). Single discretionary scalp system, not multiple strategies. Author frames it as only a 'marginal edge' relying on discretionary 'Risk Per Click' sizing (1-4 clicks, non-%; replace with RISK_FIXED). Range-bar variant is not testable in the time-based tester (optional, ignore). Rejected member's TP variant (APB flip touching 5 EMA). Fits session-structure driver rather than swing-MR, but plain HA color-flip is a weak mechanical prior; LOW due to forum source + discretionary exit/sizing core.

notes: Text extracted via pypdf (Read tool could not render pages: poppler/pdftoppm not installed).
One core strategy across all 46 pages; remainder of thread is trade-screenshot chatter with no additional distinct rules.
